SEARCH
Package compiler.simulation

Class Critter

java.lang.Object
compiler.simulation.Critter
public class Critter extends Object
Mutable critter state tracked by the world and controller. This class owns the critter's memory array, which scales with memorySize.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Critter(int x, int y, int direction, int energy, int size, InterpreterVisitor interpreterVisitor)
    Creates a critter with explicit position, size, and interpreter.
    Critter(int x, int y, int direction, int energy, Program program)
    Creates a critter with explicit position and a program-backed interpreter.
    Critter(int x, int y, int direction, int energy, InterpreterVisitor interpreterVisitor)
    Creates a critter with explicit position and interpreter.
    Critter(int energy, int direction, Program program)
    Creates a critter at the origin with a program-backed interpreter.
    Critter(int energy, int direction, InterpreterVisitor interpreterVisitor)
    Creates a critter at the origin with a provided interpreter.

    Computes critter complexity using the formula: complexity = r * RULE_COST + (offense + defense) * ABILITY_COST

    Moves critter to a new location.

    Returns a value from the critter's memory array.

    setDefense(int newDefense)
    Sets defense with minimum 1 enforcement.
    void
    setDirection(int direction)
    Sets the direction using modular normalization into range 0..5.
    void
    setMemorySize(int newSize)
    Sets memory size with minimum 7 enforcement.
    void
    setOffense(int newOffense)
    Sets offense with minimum 1 enforcement.
    void
    setPosture(int newPosture)
    Sets posture with bounds enforcement (0-99).

    Syncs the memory array with derived critter state.

  • Constructor Details

    • Critter

      public Critter(int x, int y, int direction, int energy, InterpreterVisitor interpreterVisitor)
      Creates a critter with explicit position and interpreter.
      Parameters:
      x - starting x coordinate
      y - starting y coordinate
      direction - initial facing direction index
      energy - initial energy amount
      interpreterVisitor - behavior provider

    • Critter

      public Critter(int x, int y, int direction, int energy, int size, InterpreterVisitor interpreterVisitor)
      Creates a critter with explicit position, size, and interpreter.
      Parameters:
      x - starting x coordinate
      y - starting y coordinate
      direction - initial facing direction index
      energy - initial energy amount
      size - initial critter size (minimum 1)
      interpreterVisitor - behavior provider

    • Critter

      public Critter(int energy, int direction, InterpreterVisitor interpreterVisitor)
      Creates a critter at the origin with a provided interpreter.
      Parameters:
      energy - initial energy amount
      direction - initial facing direction index
      interpreterVisitor - behavior provider

    • Critter

      public Critter(int x, int y, int direction, int energy, Program program)
      Creates a critter with explicit position and a program-backed interpreter.
      Parameters:
      x - starting x coordinate
      y - starting y coordinate
      direction - initial facing direction index
      energy - initial energy amount
      program - AST program used for behavior

    • Critter

      public Critter(int energy, int direction, Program program)
      Creates a critter at the origin with a program-backed interpreter.
      Parameters:
      energy - initial energy amount
      direction - initial facing direction index
      program - AST program used for behavior

  • Method Details

    • getInterpreterVisitor

      public InterpreterVisitor getInterpreterVisitor()
      Returns the behavior interpreter.
      Returns:
      interpreter bound to this critter

    • updateInterpreter

      public void updateInterpreter(InterpreterVisitor newInterpreter)
      Updates the interpreter for this critter (used by mutation system).
      Parameters:
      newInterpreter - new interpreter to use

    • getX

      public int getX()
      Returns the current x coordinate.
      Returns:
      x position

    • getY

      public int getY()
      Returns the current y coordinate.
      Returns:
      y position

    • getDirection

      public int getDirection()
      Returns the current direction index in range 0..5.
      Returns:
      facing direction index

    • getEnergy

      public int getEnergy()
      Returns the current energy value.
      Returns:
      critter energy

    • getSize

      public int getSize()
      Returns the current critter size.
      Returns:
      critter size (minimum 1)

    • getMemorySize

      public int getMemorySize()
      Returns the memory size (number of memory slots).
      Returns:
      memory size (minimum 7)

    • setMemorySize

      public void setMemorySize(int newSize)
      Sets memory size with minimum 7 enforcement.
      Parameters:
      newSize - memory size to set

    • getOffense

      public int getOffense()
      Returns offensive ability.
      Returns:
      offense value (minimum 1)

    • setOffense

      public void setOffense(int newOffense)
      Sets offense with minimum 1 enforcement.
      Parameters:
      newOffense - offense value to set

    • getDefense

      public int getDefense()
      Returns defensive ability.
      Returns:
      defense value (minimum 1)

    • setDefense

      public void setDefense(int newDefense)
      Sets defense with minimum 1 enforcement.
      Parameters:
      newDefense - defense value to set

    • getPosture

      public int getPosture()
      Returns the posture value.
      Returns:
      posture value (0-99)

    • setPosture

      public void setPosture(int newPosture)
      Sets posture with bounds enforcement (0-99).
      Parameters:
      newPosture - posture value to set

    • getMemory

      public int[] getMemory()
      Returns the critter's memory array.
      Returns:
      memory array owned by this critter

    • readMemory

      public int readMemory(int index)
      Returns a value from the critter's memory array.
      Parameters:
      index - memory index
      Returns:
      stored value, or 0 for out-of-bounds indices

    • writeMemory

      public void writeMemory(int index, int value)
      Writes a value to the critter's memory array. Special handling: memory[6] (posture) is bounded to 0-99.
      Parameters:
      index - memory index
      value - value to write

    • syncMemoryArray

      public void syncMemoryArray()
      Syncs the memory array with derived critter state. Called at the start of each turn and after state changes. memory[0] = array length memory[1] = defense memory[2] = offense memory[3] = size memory[4] = energy memory[5] = pass (updated by interpreter) memory[6] = posture (mutable, bounded 0-99)

    • calculateAppearance

      public int calculateAppearance(int observerDirection)
      Calculates the critter's appearance encoding as seen by an observer. Formula: size * 1000 + posture * 10 + relative_direction Where relative_direction = (this.direction - observer.direction + 6) % 6
      Parameters:
      observerDirection - the direction the observing critter is facing
      Returns:
      appearance encoding integer

    • getComplexity

      public int getComplexity()
      Computes critter complexity using the formula: complexity = r * RULE_COST + (offense + defense) * ABILITY_COST
      Returns:
      computed complexity value

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Indicates whether the critter is alive.
      Returns:
      true when alive

    • isDead

      public boolean isDead()
      Indicates whether the critter is dead.
      Returns:
      true when dead

    • adjustEnergy

      public void adjustEnergy(int delta)
      Adds the given delta to energy and updates alive status.
      Parameters:
      delta - signed energy delta

    • setDirection

      public void setDirection(int direction)
      Sets the direction using modular normalization into range 0..5.
      Parameters:
      direction - direction index to assign

    • grow

      public void grow()
      Increases critter size by one.

    • createOffspring

      public Critter createOffspring(int initialEnergy)
      Creates a newborn critter inheriting behavior from this critter.
      Parameters:
      initialEnergy - energy assigned to the newborn
      Returns:
      a new critter instance configured for offspring behavior

    • mutateAttribute

      public void mutateAttribute(Random random)
      Applies a random attribute mutation to this critter. Chooses one of (memorySize, offense, defense) uniformly, then increments or decrements it uniformly with boundaries enforced.
      Parameters:
      random - random source

    • moveTo

      public void moveTo(int x, int y)
      Moves critter to a new location.
      Parameters:
      x - target x coordinate
      y - target y coordinate
